rationale: Vivid, clear, and well organized. The essay uses concrete details—the chlorine smell, deck geography, high dive, plant closure—to reveal the town through the pool in a focused way. Voice feels human and reflective. It is slightly more lyrical than plainspoken in places, so simplicity and economy are a bit lower than the top score.
